message.content:
@startuml
title Project - Staff – Update

skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]" 1 "" #LightGray


participant "Client" as Client { } 
rectangle "#FF6347\nProjectService" as PS {} 

box RedisCache/Kafka #lightblue
    participant "RedisCache" as RC { }  
    participant Kafka <<queue>>{ }    
end box  

box Persister/Indexer/Error/ElasticSearch/Database #white   
   rectangle "#FFA500\nPersisterService"as PerS{}     
     note right of PerS : Store data in DB & ES via async queue processing using kafka consumer group pattern for scalability purposes like load balancing across multiple instances running concurrently without any single point failure risk involved here since each instance processes independently based on partition assignment strategy chosen during configuration phase itself which ensures high availability even if one node goes down temporarily due maintenance window etcetera...      
     
    
       rectanle IndexSerivce IS#orange       
         activatE Is        
          deactivateIs         
          
        
        errorServic eES#error red           
            activateEs            
             deactivates

lardec拉德卡尔德拉塞尔德拉卡尔达雷德拉克尔达拉塞德勒克拉德尔卡拉德里亚克勒达尔克莱尔达克莱德莱瑟戴尔克雷格·麦克唐纳（Craig MacDonald）是苏格兰前职业足球运动员，司职中场。退役后转型教练生涯，曾执教多家俱乐部包括邓迪联、圣米伦及艾尔联等队，并以青训培养闻名。\n\n### **职业生涯亮点**\n- \n作为球员时期效力于阿伯丁期间赢得过两次苏超冠军以及一次欧洲优胜者杯亚军荣誉；转会至凯尔特人后又收获三冠王成就——联赛+足总盃 +联盟杯双料王者身份加冕！然而真正让他名扬四海还是在于挂靴之后投身教育事业当中去啦～从最初担任青年军教头开始逐步晋升直至成为一线队伍主帅位置上来着……其间不仅成功带领球队升入顶级行列还发掘出了不少未来之星比如像瑞恩·克里斯蒂这样的天才少年哦！！总之可以说是一位非常值得尊敬爱戴的好老师好榜样呢嘻嘻嘻~~~~~</note>

activateI S                
deacticate I

dea ctive
